text:
While not as plentiful as Bandai Model Kits, Kotobukiya makes up for their limited selection with a more unique selection of kits including many kits never produced by Bandai. Though they come at a higher price, Kotobukiya models make up for it by including more color separation through the use of smaller parts and pre-painted parts.

__TOC__

Main Line Models

Being main line kits, these models are based on the Neon Genesis Evangelion and Rebuild of Evangelion continuities. Every model in this line are recreated at a 1/400 scale.

Megami Device

The Megami Device series by Kotobukiya is a cross-franchise line of Mecha Musume kits with a large focus on recreating figure quality with model kit customization. Kits often include several unique face plates for changing expressions, dozens of hand, armor and body option parts and various weapons including the use of painted parts for various small details throughout the kit.
